GameID.description: The unique ID of this game

Season.description: The MLB season of the game

SeasonType.description: The type of season that this record corresponds to (1=Regular Season, 2=Preseason, 3=Postseason, 4=Offseason, 5=AllStar)

Status.description: Indicates the game's status. Possible values include: Scheduled, InProgress, Final, Suspended, Delayed, Postponed, Canceled, Forfeit, NotNecessary

DateTime.description: The date and time of the game in US Eastern Time

AwayTeam.description: The abbreviation [Key] of the away team

HomeTeam.description: The abbreviation [Key] of the Home Team

AwayTeamID.description: The unique TeamID of the away team

HomeTeamID.description: The unique ID of the home team

RescheduledGameID.description: The GameID of the game that was rescheduled from this game. This only pertains to postponed games that require rescheduling.

StadiumID.description: The unique ID of the stadium

IsClosed.description: Indicates whether the game is over and the final score has been verified and closed out. Note: it is recommend for bet resulting to use IsClosed = True rather than simply Final game status.

Updated.description: The date and time of the late update made to this record (in US Eastern Time)

GameEndDateTime.description: The date and time that the game ended in US Eastern Time

DateTimeUTC.description: The date and time of the game in UTC

SeriesInfo.description: Contains relevant series data for postseason series only - HomeTeamWins; AwayTeamWins; GameNumber; and MaxLength

RescheduledFromGameID.description: The GameID of the originally scheduled, postponed game, that this game was rescheduled from. This only pertains to games that are scheduled as "make up" games.

SuspensionResumeDay.description: The date a game that was suspended in play will be resumed for play. Useful for tracking when a Suspended game will return to an InProgress status.

SuspensionResumeDateTime.description: The date and start-time that the suspended in play game will be resumed for play. Useful for tracking when a Suspended game will return to an InProgress status.
